title: crucianella maritima
intro: Crucianella maritima, also known as Sea-heath or Sea-knapweed, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant's roots and leaves contain compounds with antioxidant and antibacterial properties, making it beneficial for digestive health and immune system support. In herbal preparations, Crucianella maritima is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its health benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
